channel.title: Posts on GOODJINC
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on GOODJINC

item.title: Building a Hugo Blog (2): Creating a Project & Applying the Blowfish Theme
item.author: hello@goodjinc.com (GOODJINC)
item.description:
In Part 1, we completed the installation of Hugo (Extended version) on the Windows environment. Now, let’s officially create a blog and apply the Blowfish theme.

1. Creating a New Hugo Project
#

Navigate to your desired folder (e.g., C:\Project) and run the command below in your terminal to create a new site. I named the blog my-blog.

item.title: Building a Hugo Blog (1): Setting Up the Development Environment
item.author: hello@goodjinc.com (GOODJINC)
item.description: As I began my journey into development, I realized I needed a space to organize and share my knowledge and experiences. After all, I have learned so much from others myself.

item.title: Hello world! 👋
item.author: hello@goodjinc.com (GOODJINC)
item.description: A short welcome post announcing the start of the blog, where I’ll share ongoing learnings and experiences in development, IT, and current projects.
